stemHtml: Select the true option regarding the circadian rhythm from the following.

options.a: It can be fully overridden by motivation and training.
options.b: It varies randomly from person to person and cannot be predicted.
options.c: It depends mainly on body mass and age rather than light–dark cycles.
options.d: It is almost the same for all people living in the same area and is important when planning sleep and duty periods.
